title: CobbleLand Cobblemon Modpack
description:
Looking for a new adventure? Try out our Fabric Modpack! Its an amazing server with hundreds of added pokemon to collect and trade!

This modpack includes the bare necessities required to join the server including cobblemon, cobblemounts, and fabric api
body:
![CobbleLand Battle Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94742e350cfd6003367ecdf44ecae31216fc0871.jpeg)
# The CobbleLand Experience
Playing on 1.20.1 Minecraft on Fabric, with over 300 newly added Pokemon exclusive to the Cobbleland Server. Aiming to bring you the best possible experience with the Cobblemon Mod. We have a growing competitive scene with bi-weekly tournaments, and also cater to the casual player base with fun little events and mods.

Our modpack makes use of these other mods to improve your QOL when playing, such as Sodium, Cobblemounts, Zoomify, and much more.

# Mega Pokemon
![Mega Pokemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f0eb73cf7020d3d03875b2c1b526ada1b543190.jpeg)
Our Cobblemon server introduces an exciting feature that allows players to mega evolve their Pokémon, providing a unique and enhanced battling experience. This special evolution boosts your Pokémon's stats, changes their appearance, and gives them new abilities, adding a strategic depth to battles. Engage in this thrilling enhancement and watch your favorite Pokémon transform into their more powerful forms, giving you an edge in your Cobblemon adventures.

# Breeding
![Breeding](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/685586f804823de4272d73433a8425752d30dd8a.jpeg)
Our Cobblemon server offers an innovative breeding feature with the use of the Pasture Block, allowing players to breed their Pokémon in a more immersive and interactive environment. By placing two compatible Pokémon together in the vicinity of a Pasture Block, players can influence the traits and abilities of their offspring, adding an element of strategy to Pokémon breeding. This feature not only enhances the depth of gameplay but also allows players to create a more personalized and powerful Pokémon team.

# Forms and Skins
![Nimbus Pokemon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96d7cc42d1b7a4a2a783d6740bee32b821887005.jpeg)
Our Cobblemon server takes customization to the next level by offering a wide array of cosmetic skins for Pokémon, allowing players to personalize the appearance of their favorite creatures in numerous creative ways. In addition to aesthetic skins, the server provides access to various alternate forms for Pokémon, enabling them to adapt different looks and abilities that can be strategically utilized during battles. These features enrich the gameplay experience, giving players the opportunity to showcase their unique style and tactical preferences. Whether you're in combat or just exploring, these cosmetic enhancements and alternate forms ensure that your Pokémon stand out in the Cobblemon world.
